clusters.label: pro_iran_fabricated_battlefield_success
clusters.description: Fake or manipulated claims depicting decisive Iranian military wins or Western humiliation.

clusters.label: hormuz_binary_closure_panic
clusters.description: Binary claims that Hormuz is fully closed/open, ignoring selective gating and controlled friction.

clusters.label: regime_collapse_inevitability
clusters.description: Claims that Tehran is on the verge of immediate internal collapse.

clusters.label: full_axis_activation
clusters.description: Claims that all aligned proxy actors are fully mobilized and coordinated.

clusters.label: fabricated_atrocity_or_casualty_visuals
clusters.description: False or unverified atrocity and casualty visuals.
